title: Detect
description: Per-frame open-vocabulary detection using YOLO-World. Unlike fixed-class detectors (DETR, YOLOS),
YOLO-World accepts any text prompt at runtime - 'monster . npc . door' - with no fixed class list.
Image in, bounding boxes + labels + centroids out. Runs in real-time on CPU, MPS, and CUDA.
Use as a fast per-frame gate before heavier models. For pixel masks use Detect & Segment.
For video segment capture with pre/post roll, use the video detection gate node instead.

input.description: AVI image stream to run detection on.

output.description: Annotated image as raw stream - pipe to any node accepting image input.
Annotated image as document - pipe to response or downstream vision nodes.
JSON array of detections: [{label, score, box, centroid}].

input.description: Raw video file - frames extracted and detected at the configured interval.

output.description: Annotated frames as documents, one per frame.
JSON array of detections per frame: [{label, score, box, centroid}].

detect.threshold.title: Confidence threshold
detect.threshold.description: Minimum confidence score (0.0–1.0) to include a detection

detect.prompt.title: Detection prompt
detect.prompt.description: Objects to detect, period or comma-separated (e.g. 'person . car . dog')

detect.interval.title: Frame interval (seconds)
detect.interval.description: Time between extracted frames for video input

detect.max_frames.title: Max frames (0 = unlimited)
detect.max_frames.description: Maximum number of frames to extract from a video file

detect.maxVideoSizeMB.title: Max video size (MB)
detect.maxVideoSizeMB.description: Videos exceeding this size are rejected

detect.profile.title: Model
detect.profile.description: YOLO-World variant - smaller is faster, larger is more accurate
